name: Spicy Cream Sauce with Shrimp for Linguine
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pasta.
2. Heat shrimp for 6 to 8 minutes until pink.
3. For the white sauce: In a skillet over moderate heat, warm olive oil. Stir in flour and cook without browning for about 1 minute. Remove from heat and stir in cream. Reduce heat, return pan to burner, and simmer until thick (about 2 minutes). Add marinara sauce; keep warm.
4. In a separate pan, heat broth and seasonings with scallions. Cook shrimp until pink. Combine broth from shrimp with the sauce. Taste and adjust tabasco. Add salt as needed. Gently add shrimp to the sauce.
5. Serve over linguine. This dish pairs well with smaller shrimp.
6. Variations: Add diced sweet bell peppers, diced tomato pulp (no juice or seeds), milk with ricotta cheese, carrots and peas (primavera), minced young leaves from society garlic or chives. Can be served with crab, lobster, scallops, or chicken using milk and a touch of sour cream instead of whipping cream.
